actionUnits.condition: Manual invocation of Player's interactable events (UnityEvent m_Calls) once the attached MonoBehaviour(s) and their serialized m_Calls are known. In the provided scene extract, Player has no Rigidbody, no Collider, and no EventTrigger listed, and no MonoBehaviour component is shown. To specify exact events to trigger, please provide the MonoBehaviour component(s) attached to Player (fileIDs, script GUIDs) and their m_Calls. If events are on child objects (Transform children fileIDs 504, 410, 296 or ['242','135','25']), please provide those objects' Collider/EventTrigger/MonoBehaviour details so we can target the correct UnityEvent(s).

actionUnits.condition: Validate lifecycle-driven behavior of GvrAudioListener on Main Camera. Scene meta confirms MonoBehaviour id=940 (m_Script guid=b1156c073149742478887bb24456f32d) matches GvrAudioListener with settings: globalGainDb=0, occlusionMask=0xFFFFFFFF, quality=2 (High). During this window, Awake and OnEnable should have fired on scene load, and Update should be called each frame. Observe no errors and confirm GvrAudio.UpdateAudioListener is invoked. To complete coverage for OnDestroy, we will need to disable/destroy this component or its GameObject later in the run (requires harness support).

Exercise early-return paths of GvrPointerPhysicsRaycaster.Raycast when the pointer is unavailable. Scene meta confirms MonoBehaviour id=941 (m_Script guid=eb5dd43baba2d4dc1bab789615567e3d) matches GvrPointerPhysicsRaycaster with settings: raycastMode=0 (Camera), raycasterEventMask=0xFFFFFFFF. Temporarily ensure GvrPointerManager.Pointer == null (e.g., disable/remove the active Gvr pointer) so IsPointerAvailable() returns false, then let EventSystem invoke Raycast. Expect immediate return with no results and no exceptions.

Cover GvrPointerPhysicsRaycaster.Raycast path using RaycastAll (PointerRadius == 0). Precondition: GvrPointerManager.Pointer is active and points forward within camera frustum; ensure at least one Physics collider is within [nearClip, farClip] and on a layer included by finalEventMask (camera.cullingMask & raycasterEventMask). With PointerRadius reported as 0.0, EventSystem invokes Raycast -> Physics.RaycastAll path. Validate both: (a) no-hit case (remove/disable colliders) to take hits.Length == 0 early return, and (b) hit case (enable colliders) to sort hits and append RaycastResult entries.

Cover GvrPointerPhysicsRaycaster.Raycast path using SphereCastAll (PointerRadius > 0) and alternate ray generation. Set raycastMode to Direct (Raycast uses pointer origin) and ensure the active pointer reports a positive PointerRadius (GvrPointerManager.Pointer.ShouldUseExitRadiusForRaycast may select enter/exit radius; either must be > 0). With at least one collider on a valid layer and within range, EventSystem invokes Raycast -> Physics.SphereCastAll path; verify results are sorted and appended. This also covers GetRay() Direct branch.

actionUnits.condition: Scene meta confirms MonoBehaviour id=926 (m_Script guid=e7dcc90c2e60c4011896c7f21fc1f557) is GvrReticlePointer with settings reticleSegments=20 and reticleGrowthSpeed=8. On enable, Awake should instantiate GvrReticlePointerImpl; Start should call OnStart(), assign Renderer.material to MaterialComp, UpdateReticleProperties(), and CreateReticleVertices() (adds MeshFilter and builds mesh). During this trigger window, Update runs each frame calling UpdateReticleProperties() and reticlePointerImpl.UpdateDiameters(). This plan also sets this pointer as the active GvrPointer via public API to integrate with GvrPointerPhysicsRaycaster on Main Camera.

actionUnits.condition: Scene meta confirms MonoBehaviour id=896 (m_Script guid=f3bf9c1bacbb04f72bb43e892c3a98a9) is GvrControllerVisualManager attached to GvrControllerPointer (fileID=25). No serialized fields; default behavior. Precondition: Ensure compilation symbols enable this script (UNITY_HAS_GOOGLEVR && (UNITY_ANDROID || UNITY_EDITOR)). Set GvrController.State = Disconnected BEFORE scene load so Start() reads 'Disconnected' and calls SetChildrenActive(false) on its children (Transform children fileIDs 527 and 365). Verify both children become inactive.

At runtime, toggle controller connection to simulate state change: set GvrController.State = Connected. This exercises Update() path where isControllerConnected != wasControllerConnected and calls SetChildrenActive(true). Verify children (fileIDs 527 and 365) become active.

Maintain a few frames with no state change to cover the no-op branch (isControllerConnected == wasControllerConnected), then toggle back to Disconnected: set GvrController.State = Disconnected. This again exercises the Update() change-detected branch and calls SetChildrenActive(false). Verify children (fileIDs 527 and 365) are inactive.

llm_context.content: Imagine you are helping software test engineers to create comprehensive test plans without delving i...
The children is "ddcontroller": {fileID: 68}. The direct parent of this gameobject is "Controller". ...

actionUnits.condition: Verification and initialization. MonoBehaviour id=915 on ddcontroller uses m_Script guid=aa952cbcc0eb13d4ca558b6da550ff55 (GvrControllerVisual). Serialized fields map to: touchPoint fileID=109; material_idle guid=3b4f6031d569a624ba87b631c93a788a; material_app guid=3fe59d3fe0697b84196c28c184197906; material_system guid=6c9fcd230d4724c40af9e27326dc25f1; material_touchpad guid=a89bc9f2db5f60743a95275d0336b6c2; touchTransparent guid=089662c06964d614db131b6b344431e4; touchOpaque guid=7bc1b31ae424a1448b1be6be3707ad31. No m_Calls (no UnityEvents) are defined on this component. Ensure compilation symbols enable the script: UNITY_HAS_GOOGLEVR && (UNITY_ANDROID || UNITY_EDITOR). Ensure GvrArmModel.Instance is not null so Start() subscribes to OnArmModelUpdate. Precondition: ddcontroller is active.

ClickButton branch. Set GvrController.ClickButton = true. Raise GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate once. Expect: controllerRenderer.material = material_touchpad; touchPoint.SetActive(false); AlphaValue defaults to 1.0 so touchRenderer.material becomes touchOpaque and color.a == 1.0 via property block.

AppButton branch. Set GvrController.ClickButton = false; GvrController.AppButton = true; GvrController.Recentering = false. Raise OnArmModelUpdate once. Expect: controllerRenderer.material = material_app; touchPoint.SetActive(true).

Recentering branch with transparency < 1.0. Set GvrController.ClickButton = false; GvrController.AppButton = false; GvrController.Recentering = true; GvrController.IsTouching = false. Set GvrControllerVisual.AlphaValue = 0.5f. Raise OnArmModelUpdate once. Expect: controllerRenderer.material = material_system; touchPoint active; touchRenderer.material = touchTransparent; both controller and touch renderer colors have a=0.5 via property blocks.

Idle + touch begin and hold (scale up path). Set GvrController.ClickButton = false; GvrController.AppButton = false; GvrController.Recentering = false; GvrController.IsTouching = true; GvrController.TouchPos = (0.7, 0.3). Ensure GvrControllerVisual.AlphaValue = 1.0f. Continuously raise OnArmModelUpdate over triggerring_time to simulate frames. Expect on first frame: wasTouching toggles false->true, elapsedScaleTimeSeconds resets to 0, touchPoint.SetActive(true), localScale interpolates from zero toward TOUCHPAD_POINT_DIMENSIONS, localPosition uses TOUCHPAD_RADIUS mapping; subsequent frames increase scale toward full; touchRenderer.material = touchOpaque.

Touch end (scale down path). Keep idle buttons (Click=false, App=false, Recentering=false). Set GvrController.IsTouching = false. Continuously raise OnArmModelUpdate over triggerring_time. Expect first frame after release: wasTouching true->false, elapsedScaleTimeSeconds resets to 0; scale interpolates from TOUCHPAD_POINT_DIMENSIONS toward zero across frames; touchRenderer.material remains touchOpaque because AlphaValue == 1.0.

Unsubscription coverage. Destroy or deactivate ddcontroller to invoke OnDestroy(). Expect: if GvrArmModel.Instance != null, handler is removed from GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate without error.

actionUnits.condition: Component mapping and serialization verification. Laser (fileID=83) has two MonoBehaviours: id=921 uses m_Script guid=51b65678ccdd949e9a58874d2880c0ef (GvrLaserPointer) with serialized fields laserColor=(1,1,1,0.2509804), maxLaserDistance=0.75, maxReticleDistance=2.5, reticle=fileID=176, reticleSortingOrder=32767. id=922 uses m_Script guid=4c173f7c6a736fe469d4acc5b108d6d5 (GvrArmModelOffsets) with joint=Pointer (0) and debugDrawTo=null. Ensure script compilation symbols: UNITY_HAS_GOOGLEVR && (UNITY_ANDROID || UNITY_EDITOR). Ensure GvrArmModel.Instance and Camera.main are present so Start() subscriptions and assignments succeed.

GvrLaserPointer initialization path. Let Awake() run to create GvrLaserPointerImpl and cache LineRenderer; verify reticle's Renderer.sortingOrder == 32767. Then Start(): call laserPointerImpl.OnStart(), set MainCamera to Camera.main, and apply initial properties via UpdateLaserPointerProperties().
Public API coverage for GvrLaserPointer. Invoke SetAsMainPointer() to assign this pointer as the active GvrPointerManager.Pointer.

GvrLaserPointer LateUpdate path. Simulate one frame so LateUpdate() runs: UpdateLaserPointerProperties() should assign: LaserColor=(1,1,1,0.2509804), Reticle=reticle (fileID=176), MaxLaserDistance=0.75, MaxReticleDistance=2.5, PointerTransform=Laser.transform; then laserPointerImpl.OnUpdate().

GvrArmModelOffsets default branch (Pointer) with null debug draw. Keep joint=Pointer (0), debugDrawTo=null. Raise GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate once. Expect transform.localPosition=GvrArmModel.Instance.pointerPosition and localRotation=...pointerRotation. DrawDebugLine() early-returns because debugDrawTo==null.

GvrArmModelOffsets Wrist branch with world-space debug line. Set component field joint=Wrist (1) and assign debugDrawTo to reticle (fileID=176). Ensure LineRenderer.useWorldSpace=true. Raise GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate once. Expect localPosition/Rotation from wristPosition/wristRotation; DrawDebugLine() sets positions using world space: SetPosition(0, transform.position), SetPosition(1, debugDrawTo.transform.position).

GvrArmModelOffsets Elbow branch with local-space debug line. Set joint=Elbow (2); keep debugDrawTo=reticle (fileID=176). Set LineRenderer.useWorldSpace=false. Raise GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate once. Expect localPosition/Rotation from elbowPosition/elbowRotation; DrawDebugLine() uses local positions: SetPosition(0, Vector3.zero), SetPosition(1, transform.InverseTransformPoint(debugDrawTo.transform.position)).

GvrArmModelOffsets Shoulder branch. Set joint=Shoulder (3). Raise GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate once. Expect localPosition/Rotation from shoulderPosition/shoulderRotation; DrawDebugLine executes with whichever LineRenderer.useWorldSpace setting is currently active from the prior step.
Unsubscription coverage. Destroy or disable Laser object to trigger OnDestroy() in GvrArmModelOffsets. Expect handler removed from GvrArmModel.Instance.OnArmModelUpdate without errors.
